title: Festive Holiday Largest 50cm Pre-lit Christmas Wreath, Traditional Green Pine with Red Poinsettia, Baubles, Holly Berries, LED Lights, Pine Cones
features: PREMIUM DESIGN: Luxurious 50cm Christmas wreath featuring vibrant red poinsettias, realistic pine branches, and festive baubles for a stunning holiday display
ILLUMINATED DECOR: Pre-lit with warm LED lights that create a cosy ambience, perfectly highlighting the wreath's decorative elements
CLASSIC ELEMENTS: Traditional combination of red baubles, holly berries, pine cones, and artificial holly leaves creates timeless seasonal charm
COMPLETE DECORATION: Ready-to-hang design includes red poinsettia flowers, shatterproof baubles, berries, and natural-looking greenery
GENEROUS SIZE: Large 50cm diameter wreath provides impressive door coverage or wall decoration for maximum holiday impact
description: Transform your home this festive season with this stunning 50cm Christmas wreath. Beautifully crafted with lush green foliage, this pre-lit wreath features warm LED lights that create a magical holiday ambiance. The wreath is adorned with elegant red poinsettias, shimmering red baubles, and natural pinecones, perfectly balancing traditional and contemporary Christmas décor. The rich red poinsettia flowers and berries provide a striking contrast against the deep green branches, while the pre-installed lights eliminate the need for additional decoration. Perfect for hanging on your front door, above the fireplace, or as a centrepiece for your holiday table. The substantial 50cm diameter makes a bold statement in any space, while the carefully arranged decorative elements ensure a professional, luxurious appearance that will last throughout the festive period. The combination of classic holiday elements with modern pre-lit convenience makes this wreath an essential addition to your Christmas decorations.
